caption: A man with short, dark hair and a slight smile is positioned in a recording studio, wearing black headphones and a dark hooded sweatshirt over a grey shirt. He is seated in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background consists of black acoustic foam panels with vertical ridges. As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same position, looking slightly to his right. His expression shifts from a subtle smile to a wider grin, and he appears to be speaking into the microphone. The lighting remains consistent across the frames, highlighting his facial features and the metallic texture of the microphone. There are no logos or on-screen text visible in the shot.
